nasb.text: Now these are the records of the generations of Aaron and Moses at the time when the Lord spoke with Moses on Mount Sinai.

esv.text: These are the generations of Aaron and Moses at the time when the Lord spoke with Moses on Mount Sinai.

cnv.text: 耶和華在西奈山上與摩西說話的日子，亞倫和摩西的後代如下。

ccb.text: 以下是耶和华在西奈山与摩西说话期间亚伦和摩西的后代。
